title: minimize (bisimulation quotient)
manager: `minimize` — reduce a machine to its smallest behaviorally-equivalent form via a Paige-Tarjan bisimulation quotient, merging states that are indistinguishable. This is classic automata minimization made a verb: a cleaner, smaller machine that provably behaves identically, useful for comprehension, for faster checking, and for canonicalizing a machine before you compare it against another.
cs: `minimize` = Paige-Tarjan bisimulation quotient; the smallest behaviorally-equivalent machine; provably behavior-preserving; aids checking and canonicalization.
